sftp_private_key.label: SFTP Private Key
sftp_private_key.description: SSH private key content for SFTP authentication (including -----BEGIN and -----END markers)

sftp_key_passphrase.label: SFTP Key Passphrase
sftp_key_passphrase.description: Optional passphrase for encrypted SSH private key

sftp_remote_path.label: SFTP Remote Path
sftp_remote_path.description: Remote directory where the output file is uploaded

mapping_config_path.label: Mapping Config Path
mapping_config_path.description: Path to the field mapping JSON file

output_filename.label: Output Filename
output_filename.description: Name of the output CSV file uploaded to SFTP

company_code.label: Company Code (BUKRS)
company_code.description: SAP company code posted on every journal line

document_type.label: Document Type (BLART)
document_type.description: SAP document type (e.g. FF for invoice)

account_type.label: Account Type (Koart)
account_type.description: SAP account type indicator (e.g. S for G/L account)

profit_center.label: Profit Center
profit_center.description: SAP profit center assigned to every journal line
